info.name: Hookdeck Sources API
info.description:
Manage sources — the upstream endpoints (webhook senders or push channels) that ingest events into Hookdeck. Supports source-type configuration, verification, allowed HTTP methods, and custom response.

Contact Support:
 Name: Hookdeck Support
 Email: info@hookdeck.com
